input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.6.2
            TITLE: the main hoop and front hoop must be triangulated into the primary structure with

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.6.2: The Main Hoop and Front Hoop must be Triangulated into the Primary Structure with
F.5.6.2 The Main Hoop and Front Hoop must be Triangulated into the Primary Structure with 
Structural Tubing  
The Triangulation must be at a node in side view for: 
a. Bends in side view 
b. Bends in front view below the Upper Side Impact Structure  F.6.4, F.7.5

final_answer: rule F.5.6.2: The Main Hoop and Front Hoop must be Triangulated into the Primary Structure with F.5.6.2 The Main Hoop and Front Hoop must be Triangulated into the Primary Structure with Structural Tubing The Triangulation must be at a node in side view for: a. Bends in side view b. Bends in front view below the Upper Side Impact Structure F.6.4, F.7.5
